The optional features mechanism is well-structured and only enables compile-time options when corresponding dependencies are present. The maintainer has selected `luajit` by default, which adds it as a dependency—this is a legitimate customization. No functionality suggests data exfiltration, remote code execution, or supply-chain tampering. The overall script reflects standard, responsible AUR packaging.
</details>
